summary: OCB TITAN AI Phase 2 testing completed. All Phase 2 features (Advanced Export, Import System, File Upload, WhatsApp Alerts) are working. Fixed 2 bugs: route order in export_advanced.py and MongoDB _id serialization in whatsapp_alerts.py. Backend: 35/35 tests pass. Frontend: 3/3 Phase 2 pages load correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/export_advanced.py - Fixed route order (specific routes before generic)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST recipient in whatsapp_alerts during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features all working. Backend APIs: /api/export-v2/master/products (xlsx, pdf, csv, json), /api/export-v2/ranking/employees, /api/export-v2/ranking/branches, /api/export-v2/warroom/alerts, /api/export-v2/dashboard/summary, /api/import/templates, /api/import/templates/{key}/download, /api/import/preview/{key}, /api/import/execute/{key}, /api/import/rollback/{id}, /api/import/history, /api/files/kpi/evidence, /api/files/products/photo, /api/whatsapp-alerts/triggers, /api/whatsapp-alerts/templates, /api/whatsapp-alerts/config, /api/whatsapp-alerts/recipients, /api/whatsapp-alerts/logs, /api/whatsapp-alerts/test. Frontend routes: /advanced-export, /import-system, /whatsapp-alerts.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp sending: Alerts are queued but not actually sent (requires API key configuration)

frontend_tests: 8 tabs (Master, HR, KPI, Sales, Inventory, Accounting, Audit/CRM, Alerts)
Export buttons for XLSX, PDF, CSV, JSON formats
File upload input (accepts Excel, CSV, JSON)

backend_tests: POST /api/files/kpi/evidence - Endpoint exists (422 on empty data)
POST /api/files/products/photo - Endpoint exists (422 on empty data)

frontend_tests: Add Recipient form with Name, Phone, Role
Recipients list with role badges and delete button

bugs_fixed.issue: Generic route /{module}/{data_type} was catching specific routes like /ranking/employees before they could match
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved specific routes (ranking/employees, ranking/branches, warroom/alerts, dashboard/summary) BEFORE the generic route

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB _id was being returned in response causing JSON serialization error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) before returning the recipient document
